title: Innovate Finance says BoE stablecoin proposals will have a chilling effect on UK market
message_html: Innovate Finance says BoE stablecoin proposals will have a chilling effect on UK market ...
snippet: Innovate Finance has delivered a stinging response to the Bank of England's proposed stablecoin regime, arguing that the central bank's position creates a significant handicap to any business models that may be developed by UK challenger banks, payments firms and stablecoin start ups

title: Transacta Partners with CryptoJets to Support Growing Demand for Crypto Payments in Private Aviation
